payload.answer: Store the intent-to-leave employer as a relative-time fact, but do not convert 'last Friday'/'next month' into an exact date.

entity_resolution.reason: Only relative time is provided ('last Friday', 'next month') without a calendar date; cannot resolve to an exact timestamp or specific instance.

memory_cards.statement: Sam said last Friday that he is leaving Goldman next month.

details: Captured as a relative-time, ambiguous-duration statement.
Did not attempt to infer exact dates.

repair_options: Provide the exact date of 'last Friday' and the month/year for 'next month' to make the timing durable and resolvable.
Clarify whether 'Goldman' refers to a specific entity (e.g., Goldman Sachs) to improve entity grounding.
